nodes.label: AI as creative copywriting assistant
nodes.grounding_span: asking a model to write a product ad or description for my Shopify store

nodes.label: AI as future PhD-level analyst
nodes.grounding_span: ask for help in setting ROAS targets in my online advertising campaigns

nodes.label: AI integration with existing platforms
nodes.grounding_span: ask for clarification about certain settings in Shopify and Google Ads

nodes.label: AI as cost-cutting tool by executives
nodes.label_negative: Self-determined pricing based on profit and competition
nodes.grounding_span: Setting product prices is something AI could help me with, but I always decide that myself

nodes.label: AI capability in image editing
nodes.grounding_span: Editing photos is another task that I generally perform myself, although AI could help me with that

nodes.label: AI as writing and formatting assistant for menus
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to continue maintaining those skills in order to provide minor design and functionality changes even though AI is taking over this type of coding

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy for product info
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination or wrong product info
nodes.grounding_span: AI provides information for a different product

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I enter so many products, that I have run out of creative ideas

nodes.label: Profit maximization and cost control
nodes.grounding_span: product prices have to do with profit margins and competitor pricing

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to continue maintaining those skills in order to provide minor design and functionality changes

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for marketing research
nodes.grounding_span: I was happy that the AI knew more than I did about how the Google Ad campaigns worked

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracies in product searches
nodes.grounding_span: I have been frustrated when trying to get help with product information or a description and the AI provides information for a different product

nodes.label: Trust in own judgment for pricing decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I only trust my own judgement

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for photo editing
nodes.grounding_span: I can see me having the ability to upload photos to an AI and having it group them together

nodes.label: Structured upfront information provision
nodes.grounding_span: I give all of the information up front and then look at the analysis and suggestions of the AI

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: The cost of AI assistance is the reason for this as well
